name: Purple Innovation, Inc.
summary: PART I Introduction Our mission is to deliver the greatest sleep ever invented. We began as a digitally-native vertical brand founded on comfort product innovation with premium offerings, and have since expanded into brick & mortar stores as a true omni-channel brand. We offer a variety of innovative, branded and premium comfort products, including mattresses, pillows, cushions, bases, sheets and more.
